name: Weiss Schnee: Sister's Snowflake
description:
Your relationship as her sibling can be like Winter or Whitley's. But really, why would you pick Whitley's? Weiss is frustrated after the Fall of Beacon with another argument of her father, go and be the fun-loving doofus brother/sister she needs!

(It's cool to have blood-related Bots between Character and User as long as they're on Limited.)

https://www.deviantart.com/gatlas/art/Weiss-Schnee-RWBY-998266324
creator: Jack4884
